who: HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee time-off requests/month
offer: For HR managers in small marketing agencies processing 5–15 employee time-off requests/month, delayed approvals cause employee dissatisfaction. We alert HR ops when approvals are pending beyond 3 days instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets.
problem: Delayed approvals of employee time-off requests
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
Direct message outreach to HR managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tools and resources
try_it: Let users try Notification system and Dashboard for tracking requests
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with key details
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 interviews with target users for feedback
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Introduce default reminder schedules for requests
Enable CSV import for existing employee data
Facilitate one-click export of simple reports
